rulings.Case Title: MARTIN J. COYNE ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFFs MARTIN COYNE, HOWARD WESTON, EDMUND CHUTE, and SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE's AMENDED MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES DENIED. The estimated value of this case exceeds by a substantial margin the actual litigation costs. Petitioners' probability of success on the facial challenge was at least 25% and the probability of success on as-applied challenge was at least 90%, i.e. a probability of success in this action was 57% with estimated discounted valued of the case of $748,669.35.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ADA SORTO ET AL VS. WEDGEWOOD, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC,'s Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination GRANTED. Moving party met the Tech-Bilt factors and the opposing party failed to show bad faith. The Court notes that there is no allocation among the causes of action provided for in the settlement agreement and the settling parties do not seek an approval of any allocation. Therefore, at the time of the set off determination, the allocation is going to be determined in the light most favorable to the non-settling party. Alcal Roofing & Insulation v. Sup. Ct. (1992) 8 Cal.App.4th 1121.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FARELLA BRAUN + MARTEL LLP VS. ELISABETH THIERIOT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Joshua D. Horowitz'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2017 line 3. Defendant Joshua D. Horowitz'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) that at the time of the transfer or as a result of the transfer Thieriot became insolvent.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FARELLA BRAUN + MARTEL LLP VS. ELISABETH THIERIOT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Elisabeth Thieriot'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2017 line 3. Defendant Elisabeth Thieriot'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action against both Thieriot individually and Thieriot, as trustee. There is no misjoinder.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY L. DAVIS VS. CARLSON YEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Unopposed Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF BETTY DAVIS's Unopposed Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Second Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY L. DAVIS VS. CARLSON YEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs CARLSON YEE and SHIRLEY LI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moot.= (501/REQ)
